exec: const payload = json.data && typeof json.data === 'object' ? json.data : json;
const access = payload.access || payload.access_token || payload.token || null;
const requestPath = pm.request && pm.request.url && pm.request.url.getPath ? pm.request.url.getPath() : '';
const refreshPayload = refreshJson.data && typeof refreshJson.data === 'object' ? refreshJson.data : refreshJson;
const newAccess = refreshPayload.access || refreshPayload.access_token || refreshPayload.token || null;
// Retry works in Collection Runner/Newman flows.

description.content: REST API for ERP Core: companies, accounts, auth (JWT), HRM (employees, departments, designations, attendance), inventory, production (orders, cutting, BOM, etc.), navigation, access control, and RBAC. Use JWT access tokens in the Authorization header.
